title: Commercial office, Type II-B, occupant load 600 with only 2 exits
notes: First true-positive case for EGR-MIN-EXITS. IBC 1006.3.2 requires 3 exits for an occupant load of 501-1000; only 2 are labeled. Area/stories/height/fixtures are clean so the exit-count violation is isolated. EGR-MIN-EXITS requires_citation=True, so the ungated baseline scores this as a fail (TP); under --with-gate it downgrades to needs_review until IBC 1006.3.2 text is in the corpus.
plan_text:
CODE ANALYSIS A-0.1
Occupancy Group: B
Construction Type: II-B
Number of stories: 2
Building height: 40 ft
Per-story area: 20,000 sf
Fully sprinklered: yes
Design occupant load: 600
IECC: Title 24 Part 6
NFPA 13 sprinkler system. NFPA 72 fire alarm.
EXIT 1 (east stair). EXIT 2 (west stair).
WC 24 LAV 15.

ground_truth.rationale: OL 600 falls in the 501-1000 band, which requires 3 exits (IBC 1006.3.2); only 2 are labeled.
20,000 sf per story within the 23,000 sf allowable for B/II-B
2 stories within the B/II-B 3-story NS limit
OL 600 Group B needs 24 WC / 15 lav; 24 / 15 provided
